title: Pilots reported engine failure and electrical breakdown as a UFO approached the aircraft [1978]

text_preview:
NOV 8th, 1978. Montes Claros-MG. 

## Translation of the report:

“Lieutenants S. and C., instructor and student respectively, during a flight with the FAB 2185 [Aircraft of the Brazilian Air Force], to RJ and landing in Galeão, heard a comment transmitted on the VHF frequency of 123.4, a conversation between two aircrafts from Nordeste [air line company] regarding of a forced landing of a [model airplane] Bandeirante of that company.

Upon landing in SBBH [Airport of Belo Horizonte] they found two classmates, disconnected from AFA [Academy of Air Force] in 1974. A pilot from Nordeste and anot
summary: On 8 Nov 1978 near Montes Claros, MG, a Bandeirante aircraft suffered sequential engine failures and total electrical blackout as a strange object flew close to the aircraft.
